authorCommits.message:
docs: update Avo documentation links (#4624)

Quite a lot of files are still referencing Avo 3 docs even though
the version is 4. I personally discovered it while generating a controller
and it was confusing.

I ran a mass update of /3.0/ to /4.0/ and _manually_ checked each and
every one of them.

Those URLs that changed a bit – I replaced.

Some URLs lead to 3.X specific changes – those are left alone:

* lib/avo/configuration.rb
* lib/avo.rb

Similar to #2556
